import type { TableBuilderConfig, TableRow } from "../../components/tables/types";

export interface Row extends TableRow {
  "project": string;
  "owner": string;
  "status": string;
  "progress": number;
  "deadline": string;
}


export const tableConfig: TableBuilderConfig = {
  "title": "Active Projects",
  "description": "Click any project to view its milestone timeline.",
  "direction": "ltr",
  "density": "comfortable",
  "pageSize": 8,
  "sortMode": "client",
  "paginationMode": "client",
  "expandableLayout": "timeline",
  "expandableIconStyle": "caret",
  "expandableIconPosition": "first",
  "paginationLayout": "full",
  "pageSizeOptions": [
    5,
    10,
    20,
    50,
    100
  ],
  "virtualRowHeight": 44,
  "virtualMaxHeight": 520,
  "enableSearch": true,
  "enablePagination": true,
  "enableRowSelection": true,
  "enableDnD": false,
  "enableColumnVisibility": false,
  "enableExport": true,
  "enableStriped": false,
  "enableHover": true,
  "enableBordered": false,
  "enableStickyHeader": false,
  "enableExpandableRows": true,
  "enableInlineEdit": true,
  "enableBulkActions": false,
  "enableColumnResize": false,
  "enableMultiSort": true,
  "enableColumnFilters": true,
  "enableRowGrouping": false,
  "enableAggregation": false,
  "enableFooter": false,
  "columns": [
    {
      "id": "c1",
      "key": "project",
      "label": "Project",
      "type": "text",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": true,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left",
      "width": 220
    },
    {
      "id": "c2",
      "key": "owner",
      "label": "Owner",
      "type": "avatar",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": true,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left"
    },
    {
      "id": "c3",
      "key": "status",
      "label": "Status",
      "type": "status-dot",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": true,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left",
      "options": [
        {
          "label": "On Track",
          "value": "On Track",
          "color": "hsl(142 71% 45%)"
        },
        {
          "label": "At Risk",
          "value": "At Risk",
          "color": "hsl(38 92% 50%)"
        },
        {
          "label": "Delayed",
          "value": "Delayed",
          "color": "hsl(0 84% 60%)"
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "c4",
      "key": "progress",
      "label": "Progress",
      "type": "progress",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": false,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "center"
    },
    {
      "id": "c5",
      "key": "deadline",
      "label": "Deadline",
      "type": "date",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": false,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left"
    },
    {
      "id": "c6",
      "key": "actions",
      "label": "",
      "type": "actions",
      "sortable": false,
      "filterable": false,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "right"
    }
  ]
} as const satisfies TableBuilderConfig;
